title: aster batangensis var. batangensis
intro: Aster batangensis var. batangensis, also known as Batang Aster, is a plant species native to East Asia, characterized by its daisy-like flowers and medicinal properties. The plant contains flavonoids, terpenoids, and phenolic acids, which are known to exhibit anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities, contributing to its medicinal properties. The health benefits of Aster batangensis var. batangensis include its potential to lower blood pressure, reduce inflammation, and improve cardiovascular health, making it a valuable herbal remedy for various ailments. Traditionally, the plant is prepared into teas, infusions, or capsules, and is also used in folk medicine to treat fever, cough, and respiratory issues.
